news:news.news:title: Tensions rise globally as conflicts in Iran, Sudan, and the DR Congo escalate, while Europe faces an energy crisis and colonial discussions in Cyprus emerge.
news:news.news:keywords: Iran conflict updates, Sudan drone strike retaliation, Europe energy crisis analysis, DR Congo Rwanda peace talks, Spain Mexico historical relations

news:news.news:title: The Bank of England is expected to raise interest rates twice this year due to inflation pressures from the Middle East crisis.
news:news.news:keywords: interest rates and inflation, impact of Middle East crisis on economy, corporate governance issues, media industry changes, real estate market trends

news:news.news:title: Tesla's Full Self-Driving system faces a potential recall as investigations into its safety continue, while other tech developments include partnerships and new product launches.
news:news.news:keywords: Tesla Full Self-Driving recall investigation, Casio luxury calculator launch, Adobe AI image generator updates, Uber Rivian robotaxi investment, Fitbit AI health coach medical records

news:news.news:title: Cade Cunningham's injury raises concerns for the Pistons, while NCAA tournament excitement builds with Miami (Ohio) advancing and predictions for March Madness underway.
news:news.news:keywords: Cade Cunningham injury impact, NFL draft pick trade proposals, March Madness predictions, Miami (Ohio) NCAA tournament win, MLB prediction market partnership

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries include a new subatomic particle, insights into dinosaur incubation, and the genetic links between cancer in cats and humans.
news:news.news:keywords: subatomic particle discovery at CERN, dinosaur nesting behavior research, cancer genetics in cats and humans, James Webb Space Telescope findings, superconductors and quantum physics

news:news.news:title: The ongoing conflict in Iran has escalated tensions, with significant military actions and political implications affecting global markets and regional stability.
news:news.news:keywords: Iran conflict updates, global oil prices rise, Ecuador gang violence, US interest rates and inflation, international accidents and safety

news:news.news:title: The Federal Reserve maintains interest rates amid inflation concerns driven by the Iran war, while Trump seeks to lower oil prices through regulatory changes.
news:news.news:keywords: Federal Reserve interest rates, Trump oil price regulations, Starbucks union negotiations, CBS News workers walkout, windfall tax on oil companies

news:news.news:title: The FBI's acquisition of location data without warrants raises privacy concerns, while Amazon defends its USPS contract amid financial struggles.
news:news.news:keywords: FBI location data privacy concerns, Amazon USPS contract issues, Section 230 reform discussions, Robinhood social media platform, latest tech product deals

news:news.news:title: Miami (Ohio) and Prairie View A&M secured historic NCAA tournament victories, while the NFL considers a significant rule change for draft pick trades.
news:news.news:keywords: NCAA tournament updates, NFL draft pick trade proposals, Rory McIlroy Masters dinner menu

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries include a hidden granite mass in Antarctica, insights into feathered dinosaurs, and a new exoplanet with unusual sulfur-rich gases.
news:news.news:keywords: hidden granite mass in Antarctica, feathered dinosaurs flight capabilities, unique exoplanet sulfur-rich gases, advancements in quantum physics, social behavior in bull sharks

news:news.news:title: Iran Conflict Fuels Global Market Turmoil as Fed Holds Rates Amid Inflation Fears
